title: Feature from idea: /login rate limit
task: Turn a raw feature idea into a PRD, implementation plan, verification approach, and PR summary.
baseline_prompt: We need to rate-limit /login. Produce the requirements document (with Given/When/Then acceptance criteria), the smallest safe implementation plan, the verification approach (including negative and boundary tests), rollout risks (feature flag, rollback, 429 behaviour, abuse considerations), and a PR summary with monitoring and observability notes.
polymath_prompt: We need to rate-limit /login. Produce the requirements document (with Given/When/Then acceptance criteria), the smallest safe implementation plan, the verification approach (including negative and boundary tests), rollout risks (feature flag, rollback, 429 behaviour, abuse considerations), and a PR summary with monitoring and observability notes. Use Polymath's shipFeature workflow with title='Rate-limit /login' scope=small.
